docs.title: Deup Docs
docs.text:
Deup 是通过公开协议的方式来构建文章内容的应用, 您可以使用 deup-js 来实现文章的生成.

目前支持的内容类型有:

  • 页面
  • 文本
  • 图片
  • 视频

docs.title: 安装
docs.text: npm install @deup-io/core

docs.title: 示例
docs.text:
import Deup, { Page, Text, Image, Video } from '@deup-io/core'
Deup.render(
new Page(
{
title: 'Hello World',
description: 'Hello World',
},
[
new Text({ content: 'Hello World' }),
new Image({
url: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300',
headers: { 'X-Header': 'value' },
}),
new Video({
url: 'https://flutter.github.io/assets-for-api-docs/assets/videos/butterfly.mp4',
headers: { 'X-Header': 'value' },
}),
],
),
);

docs.title: BlockType
docs.text:
块类型, 枚举类型.

enum BlockType {
PAGE = 'page',
TEXT = 'text',
IMAGE = 'image',
VIDEO = 'video',
}

docs.title: page
docs.text: 页面类型, BlockType.PAGE

docs.title: text
docs.text: 文本类型, BlockType.TEXT

docs.title: image
docs.text: 图片类型, BlockType.IMAGE

docs.title: video
docs.text: 视频类型, BlockType.VIDEO

docs.title: Block
docs.text: 抽象类, 所有的块类型都继承自 Block.

docs.title: type
docs.text:
块类型.

protected type: BlockType

docs.title: attributes
docs.text:
块属性.

protected attributes:
| PageAttributes
| TextAttributes
| ImageAttributes
| VideoAttributes

docs.title: children
docs.text:
子块, 目前只有 page 类型, 才允许有子快.

protected children?: Block[]

docs.title: Deup
docs.text: 基础类, 里面包含一些文章构建的基础方法, 比如 render 用于渲染文章.

docs.title: isDeupApp
docs.text:
Deup.isDeupApp 判断当前环境是否是 Deup 应用.

public static isDeupApp: boolean

docs.title: render
docs.text:
最终的渲染方法, 调用这个方法就能看到文章的预览效果.

public static render(block: Block): void

docs.title: ImageAttributes
docs.text:
图片的可设置属性.

interface ImageAttributes {
url: string;
headers?: Record<string, string>;
}

docs.title: url
docs.text: 图片地址, 必填, 字符串类型.

docs.title: headers
docs.text: 加载图片时使用的自定义头信息, map 类型.

docs.title: Image
docs.text: 图片类型, 继承自 Block.

docs.title: new Image()
docs.text:
Constructs a new image.

new Image(attr: ImageAttributes)

示例:

new Image({
url: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300',
headers: { 'X-Header': 'value' },
})

docs.title: PageAttributes
docs.text:
页面的可设置属性.

interface PageAttributes {
title: string;
description?: string;
}

docs.title: title
docs.text: 页面的标题, 必填, 字符串类型.

docs.title: description
docs.text: 页面的内容描述, 可选, 字符串类型.

docs.title: Page
docs.text: 页面类型, 可以包含任意子块, 继承自 Block.

docs.title: new Page()
docs.text:
Constructs a new page.

new Page(attr: PageAttributes, children?: Block[])

示例:

new Page(
{
title: 'Hello World',
description: 'Hello World',
},
[new Text({ content: 'Hello World' })],
);

docs.title: TextAttributes
docs.text:
文本的可设置属性.

interface TextAttributes {
content: string;
}

docs.title: content
docs.text: 需要渲染的文本内容, 必填, 字符串类型.

docs.title: Text
docs.text: 文本类型, 继承自 Block.

docs.title: new Text()
docs.text:
Constructs a new text.

new Text(attr: TextAttributes)

示例:

new Text({ content: 'Hello World' })

docs.title: VideoAttributes
docs.text:
图片的可设置属性.

interface VideoAttributes {
url: string;
headers?: Record<string, string>;
}

docs.title: url
docs.text: 视频地址, 必填, 字符串类型.

docs.title: headers
docs.text: 加载视频时使用的自定义头信息, map 类型.

docs.title: Video
docs.text: 视频类型, 继承自 Block.

docs.title: new Video()
docs.text:
Constructs a new video.

new Video(attr: VideoAttributes)

示例:

new Video({
url: 'https://flutter.github.io/assets-for-api-docs/assets/videos/butterfly.mp4',
headers: { 'X-Header': 'value' },
})
